# Registrar

Buy and renew your domain at cost, add another layer of security to your DNS records for free

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Cloudflare Registrar](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/index.md): Register and manage domains at cost with Cloudflare.

## About

- [About](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/about/index.md): Learn how Cloudflare Firewall Rules work.

## Registrar API

- [Registrar API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/registrar-api/index.md): Search and register domains via the Registrar API.

## Top Level Domains supported

- [Top Level Domains supported](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/top-level-domains/index.md): View supported top-level domains for registration.
- [.UK domains](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/top-level-domains/uk-domains/index.md): Manage .UK domains with Cloudflare Registrar.
- [.US domains](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/top-level-domains/us-domains/index.md): Register and manage .US domains with Cloudflare.

## Cloudflare Custom Domain Protection

- [Cloudflare Custom Domain Protection](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/custom-domain-protection/index.md): Enterprise domain protection against hijacking.

## WHOIS requests

- [WHOIS requests](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/whoisrequests/index.md): Submit WHOIS disclosure requests to Cloudflare.

## FAQ

- [FAQ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/faq/index.md): Answers to common questions.

## API reference

- [API reference](https://developers.cloudflare.com/api/resources/registrar/index.md): Access the API reference documentation.

## Troubleshoot failed domain transfers

- [Troubleshoot failed domain transfers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/troubleshooting/index.md): Fix common domain transfer issues.

## account-options

- [Registrant contact updates](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/account-options/domain-contact-updates/index.md): Update domain registrant contact information.
- [Domain management](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/account-options/domain-management/index.md): Manage your registered domains in the dashboard.
- [iCloud Custom Email Domains](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/account-options/icloud-domains/index.md): Set up iCloud custom email domains via Cloudflare.
- [Move a Cloudflare Registrar domain registration between accounts](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/account-options/inter-account-transfer/index.md): Transfer domain registration between Cloudflare accounts.
- [Renew domains](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/account-options/renew-domains/index.md): Manage automatic and manual domain renewals.
- [Transfer domain out from Cloudflare](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/account-options/transfer-out-from-cloudflare/index.md): Transfer your domain to another registrar.
- [WHOIS redaction](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/account-options/whois-redaction/index.md): Protect personal data with WHOIS redaction.

## get-started

- [Enable DNSSEC](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/get-started/enable-dnssec/index.md): Enable DNSSEC for your registered domain.
- [Register a new domain](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/get-started/register-domain/index.md): Register a new domain with Cloudflare.
- [Transfer your domain to Cloudflare](https://developers.cloudflare.com/registrar/get-started/transfer-domain-to-cloudflare/index.md): Transfer a domain to Cloudflare Registrar from another registrar.
